creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unable to reproduce this bug. It may have been fixed by a previous commit.

bob# /usr/libexec/kadmind 
2023-02-06T10:37:07 connection from IPv4:127.0.0.1
2023-02-06T10:37:09 root@EXAMPLE.ORG: CREATE @
2023-02-06T10:37:09 CREATE: Operation requires `add' privilege



bob# ./kadmind18a
bob#
